title: ScriptPubKey Managers
description: Bitcoin Core ScriptPubKey Managers are wallet components that own scriptPubKey sets, address generation branches, and ownership tracking for specific output types. In descriptor wallets, the wallet becomes a collection of these managers instead of one monolithic key-and-address store.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: ScriptPubKeyManagers
resources.notes: Primary walkthrough of the SPKM abstraction, per-output-type managers, and the internal versus external split.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Keys in the Wallet
resources.notes: Explains why descriptor wallets replaced the older keypool model and why script management was separated into dedicated managers.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for wallet structure, script templates, and address derivation background relevant to Core wallet internals.
